name: Cheesecake to Live for (1 of 2)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix graham cracker crumbs, Grape-Nuts cereal, and vegetable oil in a bowl until well combined.
2. Place the mixture into a springform pan to form the crust.
Filling:
1. In another bowl, combine nonfat cottage cheese, yogurt cheese made from nonfat plain yogurt (following procedure), low-fat cream cheese (8 oz, softened), sugar (1 1/4 cups), eggs (2 large), egg whites (2), cornstarch (1 tbsp), vanilla extract (1 tsp), grated lemon zest (1 tsp), and lemon juice (1 tsp).
2. Mix all ingredients until well combined.
Topping:
1. In a separate bowl, combine yogurt cheese made from nonfat plain yogurt (following procedure), sugar (1/3 cup), and vanilla extract (1 tsp).
Fruit and Glaze:
- 4 Navel oranges
- 1/4 cup apricot preserves
- 2 tablespoons orange liqueur (such as Grand Marnier)
- 4 peeled and sliced kiwi fruit
- 2 cups hulled strawberries
1. Prepare the fruit glaze by mixing the remaining ingredients in a small bowl until smooth.
2. Drizzle the glaze over the cheesecake before serving.
